testcase.name: T-UI-21 - Verify that Admin views Plants page with all management controls visible

failure.message: [Plants navigation link should be active (highlighted)] Expecting value to be true but was false

testcase.failure: [Plants navigation link should be active (highlighted)] Expecting value to be true but was false
testcase.system-err: [Plants navigation link should be active (highlighted)] Expecting value to be true but was false qatraining.steps.UiPlantsSteps.verifyPlantsNavLinkActive(UiPlantsSteps.java:158) ✽.the Plants navigation link should be active(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/plants/ui_plants.feature:13)

testcase.name: T-UI-22 - Verify that Admin successfully adds a new plant with valid data
T-UI-23 - Verify that Add Plant form shows field-level validation errors for invalid inputs
T-UI-24 - Verify that Admin edits a plant and the Low badge appears when quantity drops below 5
T-UI-25 - Verify that Admin deletes a plant via confirmation prompt
T-UI-26 - Verify that User views Plants page and all management controls are hidden

failure.message: [Actions column header should NOT be visible for a normal User (BUG-004)] Expecting value to be false but was true

testcase.failure: [Actions column header should NOT be visible for a normal User (BUG-004)] Expecting value to be false but was true
testcase.system-err: [Actions column header should NOT be visible for a normal User (BUG-004)] Expecting value to be false but was true qatraining.steps.UiPlantsSteps.verifyActionsColumnNotVisible(UiPlantsSteps.java:365) ✽.the Actions column should not be visible in the plants table(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/plants/ui_plants.feature:70)

testcase.name: T-UI-27 - Verify that User searches for a plant by name

failure.message: [Search for 'Rose Mary' should return at least one result (BUG-005: multi-word search returns no results)] Expecting actual: 0 to be greater than: 0

testcase.failure: [Search for 'Rose Mary' should return at least one result (BUG-005: multi-word search returns no results)] Expecting actual: 0 to be greater than: 0
testcase.system-err:
[Search for 'Rose Mary' should return at least one result (BUG-005: multi-word search returns no results)] Expecting actual: 0 to be greater than: 0
qatraining.steps.UiPlantsSteps.verifyPlantSearchResults(UiPlantsSteps.java:399) ✽.validate the plant table should show only plants matching the search term(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/plants/ui_plants.feature:79)

testcase.name: T-UI-28 - Verify that User filters plants by category
T-UI-29 - Verify that User sorts plant list by Name, Price, and Stock ascending then descending
T-UI-30 - Verify that User directly navigates to /ui/plants/add and is denied access
T-UI-31 - Verify that Plants table fourth column header should be named Quantity not Stock

failure.message: [Fourth column header should be 'Quantity' (BUG-007: actual header is 'Stock')] expected: "Quantity" but was: "Stock"

testcase.failure: [Fourth column header should be 'Quantity' (BUG-007: actual header is 'Stock')] expected: "Quantity" but was: "Stock"
testcase.system-err: [Fourth column header should be 'Quantity' (BUG-007: actual header is 'Stock')] expected: "Quantity" but was: "Stock" qatraining.steps.UiPlantsSteps.verifyFourthColumnHeader(UiPlantsSteps.java:140) ✽.validate the fourth column header in the plants table should be "Quantity"(file:///home/runner/work/B21_AI_Group_11/B21_AI_Group_11/src/test/resources/features/plants/ui_plants.feature:114)
